# Cqm1_Phylogenetics
2026 cqm1 &amp; ace2 gene tree project. Includes IDX sequences from SLC and sequences retrieved from recently published whole genomes

### Sequencing and Blast Search:
DNA extraed larvae from SLC bike routes treated with methoprene (met), spinosed (spi), and lysinibacillus sphaericus (lsp) using quiagen kit. Sequencing done using ??? at CT ag station.  

BLAST search against Culex (and some outgroups) genomes using this sequence for cqm1:
>KY929304.1 Culex quinquefasciatus isolate Trombay binary toxin receptor protein (Cqm1) gene, complete cds


and this sequence for ace2:
>ON563187.1 Culex quinquefasciatus isolate II-Ace2 acetylcholinesterase (Ace2) gene, partial cds


Aligned fastas were downloaded when query had a good match. Alligned fastas sometimes trimmed to remove extra incomplete, poor matches. Complete sequence FASTA downloaded when there was extra intron between close matches that seemed to be part of the same sequence (idCulPipi1.1 alt). 

Metadata found in culex_genomes and IDX_UT_RESULTS

### Cleaning and Aligning Data
